overall.description: A scene from a fantasy video game depicting a grand Gothic-style hall with students in dark robes walking around a central equestrian fountain. The camera maintains a stationary third-person perspective from behind a silhouetted character overlooking the marble-floored atrium.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with central fountain and Gothic architecture

agents.ego_description: standing still on the upper balcony overlooking the hall, watching students walk below

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the fountain
group of students conversing near the staircase

entered.detail: large ornate fountain with statue of figure on horseback, water cascading down tiers
intricate patterned marble flooring with star and circular designs in warm tones
tall Gothic archways with pointed tops and stone tracery at the far end of the hall
massive tapestry covering the back wall depicting a landscape or historical scene
sweeping stone staircase with balustrades leading to upper levels

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a grand Gothic hall viewed from behind a stationary character. Students in dark robes traverse the geometric marble floor around a central equestrian fountain. The background features massive Gothic archways and a large wall tapestry, while natural crowd movement creates a living atmosphere in this institutional setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective within a grand Gothic hall, capturing the living atmosphere of a bustling institutional atrium. It begins from behind a stationary silhouetted character, looking out over a geometric marble floor where students in dark robes move in various directions. As the camera lingers, the focus expands to encompass the scale of the environment, highlighting the massive Gothic archways and a large wall tapestry in the background. The scene then settles on the central equestrian fountain, which serves as the anchor for the natural crowd movement flowing through the space.
